ingestion_entrypoints.role: main runtime ingestion trigger inside runPipeline/runSchedulerCycle
explicit alias used for forced startup ingestion run

market_quotes.query: INSERT INTO market_quotes ... ON CONFLICT(symbol) DO UPDATE ... updated_at = now()

market_metrics_primary.query: INSERT INTO market_metrics ... ON CONFLICT(symbol) DO UPDATE ... updated_at = now()

market_metrics_queue_path.query: INSERT INTO market_metrics ... ON CONFLICT(symbol) DO UPDATE ... updated_at = NOW()

diagnosis.likely_root_cause: queue metrics path updated last_updated but not updated_at, causing stale MAX(updated_at) checks
diagnosis.secondary_risk: ingestion batches can return zero rows from provider and silently reduce write volume
